title: LineInspector Results
description:
LineInspector Results

LineInspector Results

The following list is a summary of the LineInspector object results with brief descriptions.  The details for each result are explained in the Vision Guide 8.0 Properties and Results Reference Manual.

Results	Description

Area	Returns
		 the area of a defect.

CameraX	Returns the
		 X coordinate position of the found part's position in the camera
		 coordinate frame.

CameraY	Returns the
		 Y coordinate position of the found part's position in the camera
		 coordinate frame.

Contrast	Returns the
		 contrast of the detected edge.

CameraXYU	Runtime only.
		 Returns the CameraX, CameraY, and CameraU coordinates of the found
		 part's position in the camera coordinate frame. Values are in
		 millimeters.

Found	Returns whether
		 the object was found.

NumberFound	Returns the
		 number of matches found within the search
		 window . (This number can be anywhere from 0 up to the number
		 of matches you requested the LineInspector object to find with
		 the NumberToFind property.)

Passed	Returns whether
		 the object detection result was accepted.

PixelX	Returns the
		 X coordinate position of the found part's position in pixels.

PixelY	Returns the
		 Y coordinate position of the found part's position in pixels.

RobotX	Returns the X coordinate position of the
		 found part's position with respect to the Robot's World Coordinate
		 System.

RobotY	Returns the
		 Y coordinate position of the found part's position with respect
		 to the Robot's World Coordinate System.

Score	Returns an
		 integer value which represents the level at which the feature
		 found at runtime matches the model for which LineInspector is
		 searching.

ShowAllResults	Displays a
		 dialog which allows you to see all results for a specified vision
		 object in a table form.  This makes it easy to compare results
		 when the NumberToFind property is set to 0 or greater than 1.

Strength	Returns the
		 strength of the detected edge.

Time	Returns the
		 amount of time in milliseconds required to process the object.
